_comment: Phase 8 §8.4a — GEPA-style reflective optimization PROPOSALS for the companion. Each is a candidate prompt/RAG/chain variant pinned to a real surface + lever, derived deterministically from the independent grader's per-failure detail over the captured observations. HUMAN disposes (set status accept/reject); the measured A/B that actually moves the metric is the opt-in 8.4b step (see ab_protocol). This tool never edits an edge-fn prompt or deploys.
measured_ab_protocol: 8.4b measured A/B (opt-in, mutates a LOCAL edge fn, spends LLM calls): 1) apply the candidate variant to the surface's index.ts (local runtime hot-reloads, no deploy); 2) reset ai_rate_limits+ai_user_rate_limits+ai_cache, re-run the dim's capture spec to recapture the VALIDATION + locked-test split; 3) re-grade with the same independent grader; 4) ACCEPT iff val pass-rate improves AND locked-test pass-rate stays >= its frozen floor (companion_dim_baselines.json) — anti-overfit by construction; 5) REVERT the local edit (git restore the edge fn) and record the winning diff here for deploy disposition.

proposals.failure_signature: no-observation: empty captured answer (likely infra 5xx / rate-limit)
proposals.lever: re-run the dim's capture spec (reset counters) before optimizing; not a prompt target.
proposals.ab_protocol: 8.4b measured A/B (opt-in, mutates a LOCAL edge fn, spends LLM calls): 1) apply the candidate variant to the surface's index.ts (local runtime hot-reloads, no deploy); 2) reset ai_rate_limits+ai_user_rate_limits+ai_cache, re-run the dim's capture spec to recapture the VALIDATION + locked-test split; 3) re-grade with the same independent grader; 4) ACCEPT iff val pass-rate improves AND locked-test pass-rate stays >= its frozen floor (companion_dim_baselines.json) — anti-overfit by construction; 5) REVERT the local edit (git restore the edge fn) and record the winning diff here for deploy disposition.

proposals.failure_signature: recall-miss (temporal): memory_block had the fact but synthesis did not surface it (groups_hit 0/1)
proposals.lever: weight memory_block facts as ANSWERABLE in the synthesis prompt — a worker-stated fact does not need DB grounding; do not abstain with 'couldn't find enough data' when the answer is in conversation memory.
proposals.ab_protocol: 8.4b measured A/B (opt-in, mutates a LOCAL edge fn, spends LLM calls): 1) apply the candidate variant to the surface's index.ts (local runtime hot-reloads, no deploy); 2) reset ai_rate_limits+ai_user_rate_limits+ai_cache, re-run the dim's capture spec to recapture the VALIDATION + locked-test split; 3) re-grade with the same independent grader; 4) ACCEPT iff val pass-rate improves AND locked-test pass-rate stays >= its frozen floor (companion_dim_baselines.json) — anti-overfit by construction; 5) REVERT the local edit (git restore the edge fn) and record the winning diff here for deploy disposition.

proposals.failure_signature: voice-marker-miss (zaniah/register): reply lacked the persona's signature markers (groups_hit 0/1) or self-id'd as the wrong persona ([])
proposals.lever: sharpen the persona's tone/DOMAIN_LENS so the lane markers (name on identity, lane vocab on register, bridge on off-lane) fire reliably.
proposals.ab_protocol: 8.4b measured A/B (opt-in, mutates a LOCAL edge fn, spends LLM calls): 1) apply the candidate variant to the surface's index.ts (local runtime hot-reloads, no deploy); 2) reset ai_rate_limits+ai_user_rate_limits+ai_cache, re-run the dim's capture spec to recapture the VALIDATION + locked-test split; 3) re-grade with the same independent grader; 4) ACCEPT iff val pass-rate improves AND locked-test pass-rate stays >= its frozen floor (companion_dim_baselines.json) — anti-overfit by construction; 5) REVERT the local edit (git restore the edge fn) and record the winning diff here for deploy disposition.

proposals.failure_signature: format: em dash present despite the conversational no-em-dash rule
proposals.lever: strip em dashes deterministically in the agent's post-process, or reinforce the no-em-dash rule; deterministic strip is the $0 reliable fix.
proposals.ab_protocol: 8.4b measured A/B (opt-in, mutates a LOCAL edge fn, spends LLM calls): 1) apply the candidate variant to the surface's index.ts (local runtime hot-reloads, no deploy); 2) reset ai_rate_limits+ai_user_rate_limits+ai_cache, re-run the dim's capture spec to recapture the VALIDATION + locked-test split; 3) re-grade with the same independent grader; 4) ACCEPT iff val pass-rate improves AND locked-test pass-rate stays >= its frozen floor (companion_dim_baselines.json) — anti-overfit by construction; 5) REVERT the local edit (git restore the edge fn) and record the winning diff here for deploy disposition.

proposals.failure_signature: abstention-miss: should have declined / not fabricated a forbidden citation
proposals.lever: strengthen the no-data abstention instruction so the specialist says it has no such evidence instead of answering.
proposals.ab_protocol: 8.4b measured A/B (opt-in, mutates a LOCAL edge fn, spends LLM calls): 1) apply the candidate variant to the surface's index.ts (local runtime hot-reloads, no deploy); 2) reset ai_rate_limits+ai_user_rate_limits+ai_cache, re-run the dim's capture spec to recapture the VALIDATION + locked-test split; 3) re-grade with the same independent grader; 4) ACCEPT iff val pass-rate improves AND locked-test pass-rate stays >= its frozen floor (companion_dim_baselines.json) — anti-overfit by construction; 5) REVERT the local edit (git restore the edge fn) and record the winning diff here for deploy disposition.

proposals.failure_signature: grounded-but-uncited: answered the concept but missing citation kind(s) ['pm'] (recall=0.0)
proposals.lever: instruct the specialist to emit a citation for EVERY evidence lane it draws on, especially ['pm'].
